title: Incorrect result from second execution of correlated scalar sub-query that uses a partial sort
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(a String, b Int32, c Float32, d Date);
SELECT (SELECT b FROM t3 WHERE a = 'ALFKI' ORDER BY c DESC) FROM t3;
SELECT (SELECT a FROM t3 WHERE b IS NULL ORDER BY d) FROM t3;
key_bug_features: Correlated scalar sub-query with partial sort
